get.description: List the operations for the provider

get.summary: List container group profiles in a subscription.
get.description: Gets a list of all container group profiles under a subscription.

get.summary: Get a list of container groups in the specified subscription.
get.description: Get a list of container groups in the specified subscription. This operation returns properties of each container group including containers, image registry credentials, restart policy, IP address type, OS type, state, and volumes.

get.summary: Get the list of cached images.
get.description: Get the list of cached images on specific OS type for a subscription in a region.

get.summary: Get the list of capabilities of the location.
get.description: Get the list of CPU/memory/GPU capabilities of a region.
Get the usage for a subscription
Gets a list of all NGroups resources under a subscription.

get.summary: List container group profiles in a resource group.
get.description: Gets a list of all container group profiles under a resource group.

get.summary: Display information about a specified ContainerGroupProfile.
get.description: Get the properties of the specified container group profile.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

put.description: Create a CGProfile if it doesn't exist or update an existing CGProfile.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

parameters.name: ContainerGroupProfile
parameters.description: The ContainerGroupProfile object.

201.description: The request has succeeded and a new resource has been created as a result.

patch.summary: Container group profile PATCH REST API.
patch.description: Update a specified container group profile.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The container group profile properties that need to be updated.

delete.summary: Container group profile DELETE REST API.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

get.summary: Get a list of all the revisions of the specified container group profile in the given subscription and resource group.
get.description: Get a list of all the revisions of the specified container group profile in the given subscription and resource group. This operation returns properties of each revision of the specified container group profile including containers, image registry credentials, restart policy, IP address type, OS type volumes, revision number, etc.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

get.summary: Get the properties of the specified revision of the container group profile.
get.description: Gets the properties of the specified revision of the container group profile in the given subscription and resource group. The operation returns the properties of container group profile including containers, image registry credentials, restart policy, IP address type, OS type, volumes, current revision number, etc.

parameters.name: containerGroupProfileName
parameters.description: ContainerGroupProfile name.

parameters.name: revisionNumber
parameters.description: The revision number of the container group profile.

get.summary: Get a list of container groups in the specified subscription and resource group.
get.description: Get a list of container groups in a specified subscription and resource group. This operation returns properties of each container group including containers, image registry credentials, restart policy, IP address type, OS type, state, and volumes.

get.summary: Get the properties of the specified container group.
get.description: Gets the properties of the specified container group in the specified subscription and resource group. The operation returns the properties of each container group including containers, image registry credentials, restart policy, IP address type, OS type, state, and volumes.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

put.description: Create or update container groups with specified configurations.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

parameters.name: containerGroup
parameters.description: The properties of the container group to be created or updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Updates container group tags with specified values.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

parameters.name: Resource
parameters.description: The container group resource with just the tags to be updated.

delete.description: Delete the specified container group in the specified subscription and resource group. The operation does not delete other resources provided by the user, such as volumes.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.summary: Attach to the output of a specific container instance.
post.description: Attach to the output stream of a specific container instance in a specified resource group and container group.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container instance.

post.summary: Executes a command in a specific container instance.
post.description: Executes a command for a specific container instance in a specified resource group and container group.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container instance.

parameters.name: containerExecRequest
parameters.description: The request for the exec command.

get.summary: Get the logs for a specified container instance.
get.description: Get the logs for a specified container instance in a specified resource group and container group.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container instance.

parameters.name: tail
parameters.description: The number of lines to show from the tail of the container instance log. If not provided, all available logs are shown up to 4mb.

parameters.name: timestamps
parameters.description: If true, adds a timestamp at the beginning of every line of log output. If not provided, defaults to false.

get.summary: Get all network dependencies for container group.
get.description: Gets all the network dependencies for this container group to allow complete control of network setting and configuration. For container groups, this will always be an empty list.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

post.summary: Restarts all containers in a container group.
post.description: Restarts all containers in a container group in place. If container image has updates, new image will be downloaded.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

204.description: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.summary: Starts all containers in a container group.
post.description: Starts all containers in a container group. Compute resources will be allocated and billing will start.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

204.description: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

post.summary: Stops all containers in a container group.
post.description: Stops all containers in a container group. Compute resources will be deallocated and billing will stop.

parameters.name: containerGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the container group.

204.description: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

containerGroupNamingPolicy.description: Container Groups are named on a generic guid based naming scheme/policy. Customer can modify naming policy to add prefix to CG names during scale out operation.

prefix.description: The prefix can be used when there are tooling limitations (e.g. on the Azure portal where CGs from multiple NGroups exist in the same RG). The prefix with the suffixed resource name must still follow Azure resource naming guidelines.

autoGeneratedDomainNameLabelScope.description: The value representing the security enum. The 'Unsecure' value is the default value if not selected and means the object's domain name label is not secured against subdomain takeover. The 'TenantReuse' value is the default value if selected and means the object's domain name label can be reused within the same tenant. The 'SubscriptionReuse' value means the object's domain name label can be reused within the same subscription. The 'ResourceGroupReuse' value means the object's domain name label can be reused within the same resource group. The 'NoReuse' value means the object's domain name label cannot be reused within the same resource group, subscription, or tenant.

display.description: The display information of the operation.

origin.description: The intended executor of the operation.

OperationDisplay.description: The display information of the operation.

provider.description: The name of the provider of the operation.

resource.description: The name of the resource type of the operation.

operation.description: The friendly name of the operation.

value.description: The Operation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PlacementProfile.description: Provides options w.r.t allocation and management w.r.t certain placement policies. These utilize capabilities provided by the underlying Azure infrastructure. They are typically used for high availability scenarios. E.g., distributing CGs across fault domains.

faultDomainCount.description: The number of fault domains to be used to spread CGs in the NGroups resource. This can only be specified during NGroup creation and is immutable after that.

Port.description: The port exposed on the container group.

protocol.description: The protocol associated with the port.

zones.description: The zones for the container group.

ResourceIdentityType.description: The type of identity used for the container group. The type 'SystemAssigned, UserAssigned' includes both an implicitly created identity and a set of user assigned identities. The type 'None' will remove any identities from the container group.

memoryInGB.description: The memory limit in GB of this container instance.

cpu.description: The CPU limit of this container instance.

gpu.description: The GPU limit of this container instance.

memoryInGB.description: The memory request in GB of this container instance.

cpu.description: The CPU request of this container instance.

gpu.description: The GPU request of this container instance.

requests.description: The resource requests of this container instance.

limits.description: The resource limits of this container instance.

name.description: The identifier of the secret reference

identity.description: The ARM resource id of the managed identity that has access to the secret in the key vault

secretReferenceUri.description: The URI to the secret in key vault

SecurityContextCapabilitiesDefinition.description: The capabilities to add or drop from a container.

add.description: The capabilities to add to the container.

drop.description: The capabilities to drop from the container.

SecurityContextDefinition.description: The security context for the container.

privileged.description: The flag to determine if the container permissions is elevated to Privileged.

allowPrivilegeEscalation.description: A boolean value indicating whether the init process can elevate its privileges

capabilities.description: The capabilities to add or drop from a container.

runAsGroup.description: Sets the User GID for the container.

runAsUser.description: Sets the User UID for the container.

seccompProfile.description: a base64 encoded string containing the contents of the JSON in the seccomp profile

id.description: The standby pool profile reference id.This will be an ARM resource id in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StandbyPool/standbyContainerGroupPools/{standbyPoolName}'.

failContainerGroupCreateOnReuseFailure.description: The flag to determine whether ACI should fail the create request if the container group can not be obtained from standby pool.

StorageProfile.description: Storage profile for storage related settings of a container group profile.

UpdateProfile.description: Used by the customer to specify the way to update the Container Groups in NGroup.

rollingUpdateProfile.description: This profile allows the customers to customize the rolling update.

UpdateProfileRollingUpdateProfile.description: This profile allows the customers to customize the rolling update.

maxBatchPercent.description: Maximum percentage of total Container Groups which can be updated simultaneously by rolling update in one batch.

maxUnhealthyPercent.description: Maximum percentage of the updated Container Groups which can be in unhealthy state after each batch is updated.

pauseTimeBetweenBatches.description: The wait time between batches after completing the one batch of the rolling update and starting the next batch. The time duration should be specified in ISO 8601 format for duration.

inPlaceUpdate.description: Default is false. If set to true, the CGs will be updated in-place instead of creating new CG and deleting old ones.

currentValue.description: The current usage of the resource

limit.description: The maximum permitted usage of the resource.

name.description: The name object of the resource

UsageListResult.description: The response containing the usage data

nextLink.description: The URL to get the next set of results.

UsageName.description: The name object of the resource

localizedValue.description: The localized name of the resource

UserAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user identities associated with the container group. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}'.

principalId.description: The principal id of user assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client id of user assigned identity.

VolumeMount.description: The properties of the volume mount.

name.description: The name of the volume mount.

mountPath.description: The path within the container where the volume should be mounted. Must not contain colon (:).

readOnly.description: The flag indicating whether the volume mount is read-only.
